016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonCreator;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
020import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
021import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
022
023import java.util.Map;
024
025/**
026 * Result of `gettxout`
027 */
028public class TxOutInfo {
029    private final Sha256Hash bestblock;
030    private final int        confirmations;
031    private final Coin       value;
032    private final Map        scriptPubKey;
033    private final int        version;
034    private final boolean    coinbase;
035
036    @JsonCreator
037    public TxOutInfo(@JsonProperty("bestblock")     Sha256Hash  bestblock,
038                     @JsonProperty("confirmations") int         confirmations,
039                     @JsonProperty("value")         Coin        value,
040                     @JsonProperty("scriptPubKey")  Map         scriptPubKey,
041                     @JsonProperty("version")       int         version,
042                     @JsonProperty("coinbase")      boolean     coinbase) {
043        this.bestblock = bestblock;
044        this.confirmations = confirmations;
045        this.value = value;
046        this.scriptPubKey = scriptPubKey;
047        this.version = version;
048        this.coinbase = coinbase;
049    }
050
051    public Sha256Hash getBestblock() {
052        return bestblock;
053    }
054
055    public int getConfirmations() {
056        return confirmations;
057    }
058
059    public Coin getValue() {
060        return value;
061    }
062
063    public Map getScriptPubKey() {
064        return scriptPubKey;
065    }
066
067    public int getVersion() {
068        return version;
069    }
070
071    public boolean isCoinbase() {
072        return coinbase;
073    }
074}
